data.title: Elbit Systems prices offering to raise $512M
data.description:
• Defense technology firm Elbit Systems (NASDAQ:ESLT) has priced an offering of 1,365,450 ordinary shares at $375 per share to raise approximately $512M in proceeds.
  • The underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to purchase 204,817 additional ordinary shares at the public offering price, less underwriting discounts and commissions.
  • The ordinary shares offered in this offering are expected to be listed for trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market.
  • The offering is expected to close on May 23, 2025, subject to customary closing conditions.
  • Elbit Systems intends to use the net proceeds from this offering for general corporate purposes.
  • Elbit Systems (NASDAQ:ESLT) shares fell 3.99% to $380.14 premarket on Thursday.

data.title: Sonae, SGPS, S.A. reports Q1 results
data.description:
• Sonae, SGPS, S.A. (OTCPK:SOSSF): Q1 Net result rose to €43m, up 77% yoy, reflecting improved operational performance across our portfolio companies which offset the impact of higher D&A and financial costs associated with portfolio expansion.
  • Revenue of $2.55B (+22.6% Y/Y).

data.title: MPC Container Ships ASA Non-GAAP EPS of $0.11
data.description:
• MPC Container Ships ASA press release (OTCPK:MPZZF): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.11.
  • Operating revenues of USD 127.1 million (Q1 2024: USD 147.5 million) and EBITDA of USD 77.8 million (Q1 2024: USD 96.1 million). EBITDA adjusted for non-recurring items was USD 66.2 million (Q1 2024: USD 96.3 million)
  • Charter backlog of USD 1.1 billion with almost full contract coverage for 2025 (96%) and high coverage for 2026 (77%)
  • Quarterly recurring dividend of USD 0.08 per share, bringing the total dividends to over USD 1 billion declared since February 2022
  • Reaffirmed guidance for 2025 of operating revenues in the range of USD 485-500 million and EBITDA in the range of USD 305-325 million

data.title: Advance Auto Parts Non-GAAP EPS of -$0.22 beats by $0.47, revenue of $2.58B beats by $70M
data.description:
• Advance Auto Parts press release (NYSE:AAP): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of -$0.22 beats by $0.47.
  • Revenue of $2.58B (-6.9% Y/Y) beats by $70M.
  • Comparable store sales for the first quarter 2025 decreased 0.6% and does not include store closing sales at more than 500 corporate locations that were closed in the quarter as part of our store optimization program.
  • FY25 revenue consensus of $8.50B, Adj diluted EPS of $1.54

  • Full Year 2025 Guidance (53 weeks)

data.title: Assicurazioni Generali S.p.A. reports Q1 results
data.description:
• Assicurazioni Generali S.p.A. press release (OTCPK:ARZGF):
  • Adjusted EPS rose even more strongly to € 0.79 (+9.4%)
  • Q1 Gross written premiums reached € 26.5 billion (+0.2%), driven by the strong performance of P&C (+8.6%), especially in Non-Motor
  • Life net inflows exceeded € 3.0 billion thanks to all business lines, particularly Protection & Health
  • Combined Ratio improved substantially to 89.7% (-1.4 p.p.). The undiscounted Combined Ratio also continued its very positive development to 92.0% (-1.7 p.p.)
  • Operating result grew significantly to € 2.1 billion (+8.9%), thanks to the contribution from all business segments, led by strong P&C performance
  • Adjusted net result increased to € 1.2 billion (+7.6%).

data.title: Tate & Lyle reports FY results
data.description:
• Tate & Lyle press release (OTCQX:TATYF): FY adjusted EPS +4% at 50.3 pence
  • Revenue of £2.12B. (-3% Y/Y)

data.title: CorVel GAAP EPS of $0.51, revenue of $231.51M
data.description:
• CorVel press release (NASDAQ:CRVL): Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.51.
  • Revenue of $231.51M (+11.7% Y/Y).

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: TD Bank surpasses Q2 estimates
Atour Lifestyle Holdings cuts dividend by 6.7% to $0.42/ADS, $400M buyback
data.description:
• Atour Lifestyle Holdings (NASDAQ:ATAT) declares $0.42/ADS annual dividend, -6.7% decrease from prior dividend of $0.45.
  • Forward yield 1.39%
  • Payable June 18; for shareholders of record June 18; ex-div June 18.
  • The Board adopted the Annual Dividend Policy in August 2024, under which the Company plans to declare and distribute dividends with an aggregate amount of no less than 50% of its net income for the preceding financial year in each of the three financial years commencing in 2024.
  • The board also authorized a three-year share repurchase program of up to US$400 million
  • See ATAT Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: BT Group reports FY results
data.description:
• BT Group plc press release (OTCPK:BTGOF): FY GAAP EPS of 18.80 pence.
  • Revenue of £20.36B (-2.1% Y/Y).
